contentBlocks.original:
अच्युतं केशवं विष्णुं हरिं सत्यं जनार्दनम् ।
हंसं नारायणं चैव तस्मात् नित्यं स्मरेत् नरः ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
acyutaṃ keśavaṃ viṣṇuṃ hariṃ satyaṃ janārdanam .
haṃsaṃ nārāyaṇaṃ caiva tasmāt nityaṃ smaret naraḥ ..
contentBlocks.translation: Everybody should meditate regularly upon Achyuta, Kesava, Vishnu, Hari, Satya, Janardhana and Narayana, the swan, which signifies the quintessence of things.
contentBlocks.meanings: अच्युतं (acyutaṃ) – Achyuta; केशवं (keśavaṃ) – Kesava; विष्णुं (viṣṇuṃ) – Vishnu; हरिं (hariṃ) – Hari; सत्यं (satyaṃ) – Satya; जनार्दनम् (janārdanam) – Janardhana; हंसं (haṃsaṃ) – swan; नारायणं (nārāyaṇam) – Narayana; च (ca) – and; एव (eva) – indeed; तस्मात् (tasmāt) – therefore; नित्यं (nityaṃ) – always; स्मरेत् (smaret) – should meditate; नरः (naraḥ) – man;
